rewritten_requirements: The system shall check for proper functioning before starting.
The system shall alert the user and stop operation if an issue is detected.
The system shall start cooking and run for the set time if no issues are detected.
The system shall emit a sound to notify the user upon completion of cooking.
The system shall stop operation and deactivate if the door is opened.
The system shall return to a waiting state if the user cancels the operation.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system checks for proper functioning before starting.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The microwave begins by checking if everything is working properly.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If an issue is detected, the system alerts the user and stops operation.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If any issue is found, such as a fault in the turntable or internal components, it shows an alert and stops working.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The microwave starts cooking if no issues are detected and runs for the set time.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If everything is fine, it starts cooking and continues for the set time.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Upon completion of cooking, the system emits a sound to notify the user.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After finishing, it gives a short sound to indicate that the process is complete and returns to a waiting condition.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Opening the door stops the microwave immediately and deactivates it.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Opening the door stops the microwave immediately and makes it inactive.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The user can cancel the operation at any time, returning the system to a waiting state.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The user can also cancel the operation at any time, which brings the microwave back to waiting.
